no_face_detected.description: Periods where no face was visible in the frame.

multiple_faces_detected.description: Periods where more than one face was visible simultaneously.

gaze_away_sustained.description: Periods where head pose exceeded thresholds (|yaw| > 20.0° or |pitch| > 15.0°).

prohibited_device_detected.description: Periods where a prohibited gadget / object was detected.

identity_mismatch.description: Periods where the detected face did not match the enrollment photo (mismatch_confidence >= 0.4).

second_voice_detected.description: Audio segments attributed to a non-primary speaker (potential additional person in the room).
